title: Case labels with different width than case expression don't match

features.name: case statement with width-mismatched literal labels
features.description: Code should include a case statement where the case expression is a multi-bit literal (2'b0) but case labels are narrower literals (1'b0) that represent the same value

features.name: equality operator with width-mismatched operands
features.description: Code should include an equality comparison between operands of different widths (1'b0 == 2'b0) that correctly evaluates to true, contrasting with case statement behavior
